title: California REAL ID Application
description: Apply for a first-time, federally-compliant REAL ID driver's license or identification card in California, on behalf of the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV). It models the DMV's own online, pre-visit document checklist and the identity-verification fields a REAL ID applicant supplies: one proof-of-identity document, any full-name-change history, and two different proofs of California residency. It pairs with the published us/ca/dmv/drivers-license-renewal — that schema models an existing licence-holder's renewal-method branch, including the boolean gate upgradingToRealId, but does not itself expand the REAL ID document-checklist shape this schema models in full. It is scoped to an adult (18+) applicant who is not an AB 60 (undocumented-resident) licence holder; it does not model AB 60 applications, a minor applicant's name-change tracing-document rules, the DMV's own in-office steps (vision test, photo, signature, biometrics, payment), or the source's separately-documented 'Second Residency' edge case. It does not submit the application; the live dmv.ca.gov source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the live dmv.ca.gov 'REAL ID' landing page, the 'What Is REAL ID?' guidance/FAQ page, the interactive 'REAL ID Checklist' tool, and the 'Driver's License / ID Card Application' (online eDL 44) page — all fetched live as raw HTML, 2026-07-02, no block encountered. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md for the full list of pages consulted.

fields.name: isAB60LicenseHolder
fields.label: Are you applying for, or renewing, an AB 60 driver's license?
fields.description: AB 60 licenses are issued to individuals who cannot provide proof of legal presence in the United States. The source states plainly that AB 60 applicants/renewers are not eligible to receive a REAL ID. If true, the flow ends.
fields.sourceRef: What Is REAL ID? — 'Individuals applying for or renewing an AB 60 driver's license are not eligible to receive a REAL ID driver's license or identification card.'

fields.name: fullLastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Must match the name on the proof-of-identity document selected below, unless a name change is being documented.
fields.sourceRef: Driver's License / ID Card Application (online eDL 44) — 'basic information such as name, address, and date of birth'

fields.name: fullFirstName
fields.label: First name
fields.sourceRef: Driver's License / ID Card Application (online eDL 44) — 'basic information such as name, address, and date of birth'

fields.name: fullMiddleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.sourceRef: Driver's License / ID Card Application (online eDL 44) — 'basic information such as name, address, and date of birth'

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Must match the date of birth on the proof-of-identity document selected below (the REAL ID Checklist requires the identity document to 'include your date of birth and your full name').
fields.sourceRef: Driver's License / ID Card Application (online eDL 44) — 'basic information such as name, address, and date of birth'

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: The source states an applicant 'will be asked to provide your Social Security number on your REAL ID application (exceptions may apply)', without detailing the exception; modelled here as required, with the exception left unmodelled (see VERIFICATION.md honesty flag).
fields.sourceRef: What Is REAL ID? — 'You will be asked to provide your Social Security number on your REAL ID application (exceptions may apply).'

fields.name: residenceAddressLine1
fields.label: California mailing address — street address
fields.description: Must be the same California mailing address shown on both proof-of-residency documents supplied below.
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'BOTH documents must show your first and last name with the same mailing address that is listed on your REAL ID application.'

fields.name: residenceAddressLine2
fields.label: California mailing address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'the same mailing address that is listed on your REAL ID application'

fields.name: residenceAddressCity
fields.label: California mailing address — city
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'the same mailing address that is listed on your REAL ID application'

fields.name: residenceAddressPostalCode
fields.label: California mailing address — ZIP code
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'the same mailing address that is listed on your REAL ID application'

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: Proof of identity document
fields.description: You must present ONE proof-of-identity document that includes your date of birth and your full name (first, middle, and last).
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Proof of Identity ... Check mark the document below that you'll use as your proof of identity.'

fields.name: fullNameMatchesIdentityDocument
fields.label: Does your current full name match what is on your identity document?
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Does your current full name match what is on your identity document?'

fields.name: passportContainsCurrentFullName
fields.label: Does your valid passport contain your current full name?
fields.description: Asked by the source's interactive checklist alongside the name-change questions. The checklist is a client-rendered wizard; this schema could not confirm from a static extraction whether the source shows this question only when identityDocumentType is a passport, or whenever the name does not match — modelled conservatively as visible whenever the name does not match (see VERIFICATION.md honesty flag).
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Does your valid passport contain your current full name?'

fields.name: howManyNameChanges
fields.label: How many times have you changed your full name?
fields.description: Examples include adoption, marriage, divorce. The source's checklist tool collects up to 5 name changes as separate numbered entries; this schema records only the count and the first name change in full (see VERIFICATION.md — a GSP-0009 repeating-structure exclusion, since GovSchema v0.3 has no repeating-field construct).
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'How many times have you changed your full name? Examples include adoption, marriage, divorce. Please enter a number from 1 to 5.'

fields.name: nameAtBirth
fields.label: Full name at birth
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'First Full Name Change ... Full name at birth:'

fields.name: changedFullNameTo
fields.label: I changed my full name to
fields.description: The full name resulting from the first (or only) name change on record. Additional name changes beyond the first are out of scope for v1.0.0 (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'First Full Name Change ... I changed my full name to:'

fields.name: nameChangeReason
fields.label: Reason for name change
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'First Full Name Change ... Reason for name change: Adoption / Dissolution of Marriage/Domestic Partnership / Domestic Partnership / Legal Name Change / Marriage'

fields.name: usesPoBoxForMailingAddress
fields.label: Do you use a P.O. Box?
fields.description: If true, one proof-of-residency document must show both the P.O. Box and the physical residence address, and the other may show only the P.O. Box.
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Use a P.O. Box? One document MUST show both your P.O. Box and physical (residence) address, and one document may show only the P.O. Box.'

fields.name: residencyDocumentType1
fields.label: First proof-of-residency document
fields.description: You must present TWO DIFFERENT printed documents showing your California mailing address; this is the first. Must be a different document type from residencyDocumentType2.
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Two Proofs of Residency ... Check mark the TWO different documents below that you'll use as your proof of California residency.'

fields.name: residencyDocumentType2
fields.label: Second proof-of-residency document
fields.description: The second of the two required, different, proof-of-residency documents. Must be a different document type from residencyDocumentType1 — GovSchema v0.3 has no cross-field 'not equal to another field' validation keyword, so this rule is recorded here in prose, not enforced structurally (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Two Proofs of Residency ... Check mark the TWO different documents below that you'll use as your proof of California residency.'

documents.label: Proof of identity document
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Proof of Identity ... This document must include your date of birth and your full name (first, middle, and last).'

documents.label: Legal name change document
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Ensure you bring at least one of the following to document each legal name change.' One document per legal name change on record; this schema models only the first name change (see the nameChangeReason field and VERIFICATION.md).

documents.label: First proof-of-residency document
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'To prove that you live in California, you must present TWO DIFFERENT printed documents that show your California mailing address.'

documents.label: Second proof-of-residency document
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'To prove that you live in California, you must present TWO DIFFERENT printed documents that show your California mailing address.'

steps.title: Proof of identity and name history
